message:
fix(validation): add chain integrity checks, state transition guards, and deterministic coordinator selection

Policy checkpoint (policy_checkpoint.rs):
- Add emit_rejection_event() for checkpoint violation audit trail
- Implement current_chain_violation() for chain integrity detection
- Add reject_if_chain_invalid() — fail-closed on chain violations
- Validate checkpoint chain on each new checkpoint and operation

Hardware planner (hardware_planner.rs):
- Add AlreadyPlaced and ReleaseNotPlaced error variants
- Track active_placements to prevent stale dispatch
- Reject duplicate placements and invalid releases

Cancel injection gate (cancel_injection_gate.rs):
- Add workflow point-count validation
- Define canonical await-point labels per workflow
- Detect structural mismatches between expected and actual workflow topology

Lease coordinator (lease_coordinator.rs):
- Filter out zero-weight candidates (ineligible for coordination)
- Sort candidates by node ID for deterministic selection
- Fix u64 wraparound in weighted scoring
- Add test coverage for selection order invariance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
